headline: Ingersoll Rand Insider Sales Raise Questions After Strong Results And Rally
summary: Key executives at Ingersoll Rand (NYSE:IR) have recently executed unusually large insider stock sales. The selling activity follows a quarter in which the company reported results that surpassed prior expectations. The transactions come with Ingersoll Rand shares around $94.14, after a strong multi year run. For investors watching Ingersoll Rand at $94.14, the timing of the insider sales stands out because the company has posted strong quarterly results while the stock has already seen...
